heading: Using a custom domain to send emails

entities.name: Email domain name configuration [PDF]
entities.mention: Magic Sheet - Email domain name configuration

relations.evidence: The database can be configured to use a custom domain
If the custom domain is `company-name.com`, the sender address will be `notifications@company-name.com`
the *reply-to* address `catchall@company-name.com`
the *bounce* address `bounce@company-name.com`
The custom domain can be utilized when sending emails either with Odoo’s email servers
or an external one
such as GoDaddy
Namecheap
.. seealso:: `Magic Sheet - Email domain name configuration [PDF]`
